phrases.intent_en: Where do I book a guided tour
phrases.text_local: Kde si můžu rezervovat prohlídku s průvodcem?
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours are often booked at the main ticket counter in Czech museums; it's uncommon to have a separate desk.

likely_response.local: Rezervace u pokladny, vpravo od vchodu.
likely_response.translation_en: Bookings at the ticket desk, to the right of the entrance.

responses.english: Bookings at the ticket desk, to the right of the entrance.
responses.local: Rezervace u pokladny, vpravo od vchodu.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the gift shop with local crafts
phrases.text_local: Kde najdu obchod se suvenýry a místními výrobky?
phrases.cultural_note: Museum shops in the Czech Republic often feature regional crafts; they are typically located near the exit or on the ground floor.

likely_response.local: Po schodech dolů, v přízemí vlevo.
likely_response.translation_en: Down the stairs, on the ground floor to the left.

responses.english: Down the stairs, on the ground floor to the left.
responses.local: Po schodech dolů, v přízemí vlevo.

phrases.intent_en: Is flash photography allowed in glass galleries
phrases.text_local: Můžu v expozici skla fotit s bleskem?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech museums almost universally prohibit flash photography to protect light-sensitive materials like glass and textiles.
